title: Investing in shares
description: Find out about the tax implications when obtaining, owning and disposing of shares, including receiving dividends.
keywords: shares, investing, tax on shares, stocks, employee share schemes

child_links.title: Obtaining shares
child_links.description: Find out about obtaining shares and what deductions you can claim when obtaining shares.

child_links.title: Owning shares
child_links.description: Find out about owning shares, including dividends and deductions you can claim.

child_links.title: Disposing of shares
child_links.description: Find out about disposing of shares, and capital gains and losses when you dispose of shares.

child_links.title: Refund of franking credits for individuals
child_links.description: What are franking credits and when individuals are eligible for a refund of franking credits.

child_links.title: Children's share investments
child_links.description: If your child is under 18 years old and they buy shares, find out about quoting a TFN and declaring dividends.
